title: ACKS II — Influence & Reactions
description: Adds a reaction/influence roller for the three ACKS II influence tones (Diplomacy, Intimidation, Seduction). Augments the ACKS system without modifying it: a character-sheet button, an /influence chat command, and a tone-aware 2d6 roller with an attitude tracker, time-to-influence, and auto-populated (and overridable) modifiers.

requires.reason: GM-routed writes: players' influence rolls persist attitude results through a GM socket handler.
Effect vocabulary and level-value semantics: scopeApplies gates every social-roll modifier and resolveLevelValue resolves level ladders, both consumed through the acks-lib public API.

recommends.reason: Lets the roller read modifiers from the structured ability effect model, so imported proficiencies and class powers drive it without hand-authored Active Effects.
